posts.author: Arockiya_Raja
posts.text: TradingView - Trade From Chart (TFC) Beta Now Live! — This TFC is bundled with multiple other chart-screen improvements. Since a few bug fixes and upgrades had to be prioritised, this got delayed. The design is complete, and we expect to make good progress in the coming weeks. We’ll keep you posted here.
